differentialBuckets.label: Key thresholds and interpretation caveats: TSH typical adult range about 0.4-4.0 mIU/L; use local lab, pregnancy, and illness context. Free T4 typical adult range about 0.8-1.8 ng/dL; use local assay.

redFlags.label: Hard fixed nodule, rapid growth, vocal cord symptoms, suspicious lymph nodes, childhood radiation, MEN2 family history.

initialTests.label: TSH.

source.source_section: Thyroid Nodules (Benign) generated endocrine workup: diagnostic workup
source.implementation_notes: Generated from endocrine workup automation; requires clinician sign-off before validated-intent activation.

initialTests.action: Interpret with local lab ranges. Reference anchors: TSH typical adult range about 0.4-4.0 mIU/L; use local lab, pregnancy, and illness context. Free T4 typical adult range about 0.8-1.8 ng/dL; use local assay. T3, TRAb/TSI, TPO Ab, and thyroglobulin Ab are assay-specific. FNA size thresholds are risk-system-specific; high-risk nodules are sampled at smaller sizes than low-risk nodules.

initialTests.label: High-quality thyroid ultrasound with risk stratification.

reference_values: TSH typical adult range about 0.4-4.0 mIU/L; use local lab, pregnancy, and illness context.
Free T4 typical adult range about 0.8-1.8 ng/dL; use local assay.
T3, TRAb/TSI, TPO Ab, and thyroglobulin Ab are assay-specific.
FNA size thresholds are risk-system-specific; high-risk nodules are sampled at smaller sizes than low-risk nodules.
